meta.safety_suffix: no watermarks, safe for all audiences, 16:9 aspect ratio, 1280x720

patterns.name: 테크 그라디언트
patterns.description: 추상적 테크 그라디언트 배경 + 중앙 한글 타이틀. 범용성 높음.
patterns.prompt: YouTube thumbnail 1280x720, abstract technology gradient background from deep navy (#0D1B2A) to electric blue (#2D7FF9), subtle glowing particles, bold Korean title text '{{title}}' in vivid yellow (#FFD600) with dark navy outline centered on image, extra bold weight, clean modern design, bright energetic mood, no watermarks, safe for all audiences

patterns.name: 스크린 글로우
patterns.description: 빛나는 모니터가 왼쪽 + 오른쪽에 한글 타이틀. AI 시연 영상에 최적.
patterns.prompt: YouTube thumbnail 1280x720, photorealistic glowing laptop screen on left side showing AI interface, electric blue (#2D7FF9) light from screen, dark navy (#0D1B2A) background, bold Korean title text '{{title}}' in vivid yellow (#FFD600) with dark navy outline on right side, extra bold weight, bright tech atmosphere, soft bokeh, no watermarks, safe for all audiences

patterns.name: AI 뉴럴 네트워크
patterns.description: 뉴럴 네트워크 시각화 배경 + 중앙 한글 타이틀. AI 기술 콘텐츠에 적합.
patterns.prompt: YouTube thumbnail 1280x720, abstract neural network visualization with glowing blue (#2D7FF9) nodes and connections on dark navy (#0D1B2A) background, yellow (#FFD600) data stream accents, bold Korean title text '{{title}}' in vivid yellow (#FFD600) with dark navy outline centered, extra bold weight, futuristic clean design, no watermarks, safe for all audiences

patterns.name: 워크스페이스 데스크
patterns.description: 테크 워크스페이스 왼쪽 + 오른쪽 한글 타이틀. 실용적 느낌.
patterns.prompt: YouTube thumbnail 1280x720, clean modern tech workspace from above, monitor and keyboard on left side, blue (#2D7FF9) LED ambient lighting, dark desk, bold Korean title text '{{title}}' in vivid yellow (#FFD600) with dark navy outline on right side, extra bold weight, minimal organized look, bright professional, no watermarks, safe for all audiences

patterns.name: 미래형 UI 대시보드
patterns.description: 홀로그램 UI 요소 + 중앙 한글 타이틀. 시각적 임팩트 강함.
patterns.prompt: YouTube thumbnail 1280x720, futuristic holographic UI dashboard elements floating in space, electric blue (#2D7FF9) and vivid yellow (#FFD600) glowing panels, dark navy (#0D1B2A) background, bold Korean title text '{{title}}' in vivid yellow (#FFD600) with dark navy outline centered, extra bold weight, cinematic high contrast, no watermarks, safe for all audiences

tips: HEX 컬러코드를 프롬프트에 직접 명시하면 브랜드 일관성 향상
한글 텍스트 렌더링 품질이 불만족이면 프롬프트에 font 스타일 상세 지시 추가
생성 후 텍스트 가독성 확인 필수 (AI 한글 렌더링 한계 가능)
